scenario.title: The API Connector
scenario.context: Your workflow needs to call external APIs (Slack, email, CRM) based on AI-generated decisions. You need to design prompts that produce API-ready payloads.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that generates properly formatted payloads for external API calls based on AI analysis.
constraints: Support both request and response mapping
scenario.exampleInput: After AI classifies a support ticket as urgent, send Slack notification. Slack API expects: {channel, text, attachments[]}. Include ticket details, priority badge, and action button.
hints: Define the exact API schema required
Map AI output fields to API fields

rubric.name: Payload Schema
rubric.description: Does the output match API requirements?

scoringGuide.excellent: Exact schema match with all fields

rubric.name: Field Mapping
rubric.description: Are AI outputs mapped to API fields?

scoringGuide.excellent: Error responses mapped with retry logic

commonMistakes: No field mapping from AI output
keyElements: AI output to API field mapping
